apiTitle: Get SMU Viewer Individual by Person Reference
description: Retrieves aggregated individual and application data for the SMU viewer by person reference (maps to IndividualProvidedDetailsId). Only returns data when the linked application has been sent for risking. Authentication is not yet configured (TODO: Stride profile).

responses.description: Individual and application data found with SentForRisking state
Individual not found, application not found, or application not in SentForRisking state

authentication.notes: TODO in source: correct Stride profile not yet determined. Uses actions.default (unauthenticated).

interactions.action: If both found AND applicationState == SentForRisking: SmuIndividualResponse.make(ipd, aa)

specialCases: Authentication NOT enforced – marked as TODO in source
Returns 204 if IPD missing, application missing, or applicationState != SentForRisking
SmuIndividualResponse aggregates fields from both IndividualProvidedDetails and AgentApplication
businessDetails/deceasedCheckResult populated only for SoleTrader; companyStatusCheckResult for LLP/LimitedCompany/etc.
Two sequential MongoDB queries: individual first, then application
